title: libanotis ugoensis f. alpicola
intro: Libanotis ugoensis f. alpicola is a variant of the Libanotis ugoensis plant, a perennial species in the carrot family, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is often used for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Libanotis ugoensis f. alpicola include its ability to soothe coughs and colds, reduce fever, and promote digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Libanotis ugoensis f. alpicola include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
